name: Tex-Mex Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine mayonnaise and 1/4 cup sour cream; stir well.
2. Add the chopped green chilies, ground cumin, salt, pepper, and onion to the mixture. Stir until combined.
3. Stir in the cooked chicken and continue mixing.
4. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
5. Preheat oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit (150 degrees Celsius).
6. Place tortillas on a baking sheet and sprinkle cheese evenly over each.
7. Bake until the cheese melts, about 10-15 minutes.
8. Transfer the tortillas to serving plates.
9. Arrange lettuce over the cheese.
10. Top each with about 1/4 of the chicken mixture.
11. Garnish with olives, sour cream, and diced tomato.
12. Serve with picante sauce on the side.
